_notes: Each scenario drives one workflow simulation on the Workflows page. pillar: 1=Sentinel, 2=Guardian, 3=Advisor. riskScore 0-100 determines pillar. steps[].type: auto|hitl. hitl steps pause for human approval. events within each step fire sequentially by offset t (milliseconds).

_pillar_guide.1_sentinel: riskScore < 25. Reversible action. No user impact. Zero human gates. ZeroOps acts silently.
_pillar_guide.2_guardian: riskScore 25-70. OR SAP/security production change regardless of score. One or two HiTL gates. Human approves, ZeroOps executes.
_pillar_guide.3_advisor: riskScore > 70. OR novel failure pattern with no historical match. Senior engineer makes the call with ZeroOps brief.

_customisation_guide.to_add_new_scenario: Copy any existing scenario object. Change id, title, incident, appId, category. Update steps[].events[].msg to use your tool names. Update remediationPlan with your actual runbook steps.
_customisation_guide.to_change_tool_names: Replace tool values in remediationPlan[].tool and steps[].events[].msg. E.g. replace 'ServiceNow' with 'BMC Remedy', 'K8s API' with 'OpenShift API', 'Azure ARM' with 'AWS CloudFormation'.
_customisation_guide.to_change_incident_ids: Replace all INC/CHG/PRE-INC references with your customer's ITSM ticket format.
_customisation_guide.to_adjust_timing: Each step has a duration in milliseconds. steps[].events[].t is the offset within that step. Adjust to match your realistic MTTR targets.

scenarios.title: GitLab CI Runner — OOM Self-Heal
scenarios.subtitle: 2,400 engineers blocked · runner JVM heap exhausted · Nexus disk 91% · ZeroOps auto-heals in 11 min
scenarios.blastRadius: HIGH — 2,400 R&D engineers blocked · 847 pipeline jobs queued · growing 40 jobs/min
scenarios.reversibility: HIGH — runner pool scaling and JVM resize fully reversible · K8s ConfigMap rollback in 30s
scenarios.whyHitl: Risk score 14/100 — ZeroOps has 94% confidence from vector DB match. Runner pool scaling and JVM resize are both fully reversible with no data loss risk. No human gate required.

remediationPlan.act: Detect GitLab runner OOM kills via K8s events — confirm OOM pattern
Match against vector DB — 96% similarity to INC0008811
Scale GitLab runner pool 8→24 via K8s HPA immediately
Increase runner JVM -Xmx 2g→4g via ConfigMap rolling restart
Trigger Nexus SNAPSHOT cleanup — upstream root cause · recover 400GB+
Validate all 847 queued pipeline jobs resumed — monitor queue drain
Auto-resolve INC0008847 in ServiceNow · notify DevOps team

outcome.result: 2,400 engineers unblocked · 847 jobs completed · Nexus retention enforced · pattern stored in vector DB

scenarios.title: SAP S/4HANA — Month-End WP Saturation
scenarios.subtitle: WP saturation 89% · 340 finance users blocked · period-end at risk · BASIS admin approval required
scenarios.blastRadius: HIGH — 340 finance users across 47 countries blocked · month-end close deadline today
scenarios.reversibility: MEDIUM — batch deferral reversible · WP config change requires warm restart
scenarios.slaStatus: P1 · 4h SLA · 2h elapsed · CFO office escalated
scenarios.whyHitl: SAP work process configuration changes affect all active dialog users globally. A restart window during month-end could cause in-progress financial postings to fail across 47 countries. Risk score 58 requires BASIS admin sign-off.

remediationPlan.act: Confirm WP saturation via SM50 — identify blocking batch jobs
Identify deferrable batch jobs via SM37 — FI_POST_CLOSE, GL_RECON, accruals
APPROVAL 1: BASIS admin confirms batch jobs safe to defer to 20:00
Reschedule FI_POST_CLOSE and GL_RECON to 20:00 via SM37
Monitor WP utilisation — if still >70% increase dialog WPs via RZ10
APPROVAL 2: BASIS admin approves WP config change and restart window
Apply WP config · warm restart SAP · validate 340 users restored

outcome.sla: P1 — SLA met · period-end deadline protected
outcome.result: 340 finance users restored across 47 countries · period-end close on track · Azure VM resize CHG raised

scenarios.title: SAP S/4HANA — Predictive Prevention
scenarios.subtitle: WP saturation forecast 47 min ahead · Guardian briefs operator · one approval · pre-emption executed · incident never raised
scenarios.blastRadius: MEDIUM — SAP FI module · 340 finance users across 47 countries · month-end close window · CFO visibility
scenarios.reversibility: MEDIUM — batch deferral reversible in <2 min · WP config change requires BASIS validation · no data risk
scenarios.slaStatus: Pre-incident · month-end close in 47 min · CFO deadline at risk
scenarios.whyHitl: Risk score 42/100 — pre-emptive action on SAP S/4HANA production system during month-end close window. Ericsson IT governance requires BASIS admin authorisation for any SAP WP configuration change regardless of risk score.

remediationPlan.act: Defer non-critical FI batch jobs (GL_RECON, accruals) via SM37 — 20 min window
Pre-scale dialog WP allocation: 100 → 130 via RZ10 rolling change
Reserve dedicated batch WP class for FI_POST_CLOSE during close window
Monitor WP utilisation every 60s — auto-alert if >80% post-change
Log preventive CHG in ServiceNow — no P1 incident raised

outcome.sla: No breach · month-end close completed on schedule
outcome.result: No P1 incident raised · 340 finance users unaffected · CFO deadline met · WP headroom restored · pattern reinforced in ZeroOps KB
